name: Golden Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, sugar, cream of tarter, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cut in shortening until the mixture looks like coarse crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center and add buttermilk quickly.
4. Stir just until the dough clings together.
5. Knead gently on a lightly floured surface for 10 to 12 strokes.
6. Roll or pat out to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
7. Cut with a floured cutter or glass tumbler.
8. Bake in a moderately hot oven with two-thirds coals on top and one-third on the bottom for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
